examples: His strategic intelligence was compiled by a fantasist.
Singleton was a fantasist who claimed to have a karate blackbelt.
It may sound too good to be true, but even his critics acknowledge he's not your ordinary sci-fi fantasist.
Which is why people chose to call her a gossip, when she was really a fantasist.
Now L.Ron Hubbard, some people say that he's a fantasist and a liar...
